items.faq_answer: Yes, subscribing to certain products gets you an assured cashback of 5%. This will be in addition to any existing offers or discounts.
items.faq_question: Are there any discounts or additional benefits if I subscribe to an item?

items.faq_answer: Cashback for all subscribed items delivered between Tuesday to Monday, will be credited to your bbWallet every Tuesday by 10 PM. This cycle continues weekly.
items.faq_question: How can I track my cashback?

items.faq_answer: No. Cashback is not applicable on milk (pouches, tetrapacks, bottles, cans etc). Cashback is applicable on all other non-milk grocery items that you subscribe to.
items.faq_question: Is cashback applicable on any item I subscribe to?

items.faq_answer: No. Cashback is non-transferable. It cannot be moved out of your bbWallet to any other account.
items.faq_question: Can the cashback be transferred from my bbwallet to my source account?

items.faq_answer: Yes. You will receive a notification on your registered email, and a push notification on your phone.
items.faq_question: Will I receive a notification when cashback is credited?

items.faq_answer: No. You can subscribe to any number of items to receive cashback.
items.faq_question: Is there a minimum number of subscriptions required to be eligible for cashback?

items.faq_answer: No. Cashback is applicable only for successfully delivered items. Cancelled, returned, or undelivered orders are not eligible.
items.faq_question: If a subscribed item is not delivered or is returned, will I still receive cashback?

items.faq_answer: Go to the 'bbDaily' icon at the bottom of the home screen. You can choose from the available subscription items there. Note: Cashback is not applicable on milk (pouches, tetrapacks, bottles, cans etc).
items.faq_question: Where can I find items that are eligible for subscription and cashback?

items.faq_answer: No, you don’t need to pay any delivery charge for your bbDaily subscription orders .
items.faq_question: Are there any charges applicable to my bbDaily orders?

items.faq_answer: This offer is valid till 23rd of March 2026.
items.faq_question: Till when is this offer valid?

items.faq_answer: The amount for your subscription orders will be automatically used from your bbWallet balance. You need to ensure you’ve sufficient balance in your bbWallet for your upcoming order to continue your subscription. Rest assured, you’ll be notified before if your wallet balance is low.
items.faq_question: How do I pay for my bbDaily subscription order?

items.faq_answer: Yes, you can check the subscription availability in your area by entering your location details in the app.
items.faq_question: Can I check the delivery for subscription in my area?

items.faq_answer: No, bbDaily subscriptions do not have any minimum order value. You can subscribe to your daily needs as per your convenience.
items.faq_question: Is there any minimum order value?

items.faq_answer: Any amount deducted for the cancelled bbDaily order will be refunded to your bbWallet instantly.
items.faq_question: How do I get a refund for a cancelled order?

items.faq_answer: In case, wrong or damaged product is delivered to you, please reach out to our customer support for quick resolution.
items.faq_question: What if I receive damaged or wrong product?

items.faq_answer: If you find out that your delivered order has some missing products, please reach out to our customer support for quick resolution.
items.faq_question: What should I do if my products are missing?

items.faq_answer: Go to your Account > Subscription. Select the product and you will get the options to pause the subscription or skip the upcoming order.
items.faq_question: How can I pause my subscription or skip my upcoming order?

items.faq_answer: Go to your Account > Subscription. Select the product you want to make the modifications to, and you will get the options to change quantity and frequency.
items.faq_question: How can I modify the delivery frequency or quantity?
